candidates.why: Small public human-cell example with object intensity, size/shape, and ExportToSpreadsheet modules.
candidates.m0_gap: Pipeline segments objects internally and does not provide pre-existing label masks; MorphoJet M0 needs a mask-export bridge or separate public masks.
